$description: Flat, agent-checkable acceptance criteria for "Xplor Hub — Login flow". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs.

criteria.text: Sign in with email opens the sign-in screen.
criteria.assert: click('Sign in with email') -> step == signin

criteria.text: Visitor log opens the visitor journey without a login step.
criteria.assert: click('Visitor log') -> step == visitor AND no credential prompt

criteria.text: The splash replays on every journey launch and dismisses itself.
criteria.assert: launch(journey) -> splash visible, auto-dismissed within ~1s; absent with ?bare=1

criteria.text: Empty email or password blocks login with the Required error.
criteria.assert: clear(field); click(Login) -> inline text 'Required' visible AND invalid field border == danger AND step == signin

criteria.text: Valid login shows a ~1s loading state then routes by journey.
criteria.assert: click(Login) -> button shows spinner + 'Signing in…'; after ~1s step == role (parent/contact) OR educator (educator journey)

criteria.text: The eye button toggles password visibility.
Both role cards open Child select.
criteria.assert: click(card Parent) -> step == child; click(card Collection Contact) -> step == child

criteria.text: Booked and no-booking children are visually distinct.
criteria.assert: booked rows have cyan 'Booked Session' pill + 'Sign In' action; no-booking rows have orange 'Casual Session' pill + 'Casual Session' action

criteria.text: Signing a child in confirms with a toast and stays on the screen.
criteria.assert: click('Sign In') -> toast '{name} signed in' visible, auto-dismissed ~1.6s, step == child

criteria.text: Both shift actions return to the Dashboard.
criteria.assert: click('End Shift') -> step == dashboard; click('Resume Shift') -> step == dashboard

criteria.text: The empty state offers no shift actions.
criteria.assert: screen shows 'No shifts to begin' + helper text AND contains no End/Resume Shift controls

criteria.text: Sign out removes the row and confirms with a toast.
criteria.assert: click('Sign out' on row) -> row removed AND toast '{name} signed out' visible

criteria.text: The Sign in card opens the New Visitor form.
Sign in returns to the Visitor log.

criteria.assert: fill(fields); relaunch(journey); open S8 -> all fields empty
